content:
Hey all,

I think we could use some more maintainers to help out with reviews on docs PRs -- right now there are 10 outstanding and the oldest are from 2 weeks ago. I think it might be time to add more maintainers to fill out our new "bandwidth requirements" as far as reveiws go!

I'd like to nominate both @Eric Gregory and @Mikhail Katychev who have been very active in docs and contributed a bunch up until now.

Thoughts @Kate Goldenring @Daniel Macovei @Ivan Towlson ?
